hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messaging with multi-provider outputs to create structured cases, route exceptions, preserve audit evidence and streamline compliance operations.

problem_title: Travel Rule messages remain outside cases
problem_description: Travel Rule data and exception details often sit disconnected from broader compliance workflows. This separation slows manual reviews, weakens audit evidence and makes it harder for VASP operations to link message status to regulatory decisions and case management.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes Travel Rule message data, routing status and exceptions into structured cases with linked evidence and decision logs so VASP operations can review, manage and report within one compliance workflow.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to cases
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages through status tracking, exception handling, case creation and evidence preservation to support structured compliance review and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule tool. The workflow control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule provider outputs into case workflows, decision logs, exception handling and audit evidence without replacing existing compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by connecting Travel Rule outputs with audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment for clearer compliance decisions and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects Travel Rule message routing, status, and protocols into structured workflows, case management, regulatory updates and reporting for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes failed or high-risk Travel Rule events into case workflows for manual review, escalation and evidence preservation, integrating these exceptions into broader compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by recording Travel Rule message details, decisions, case notes and provider outputs to support review, reporting and regulatory obligations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above multiple Travel Rule providers, connecting and normalizing their outputs without replacing existing vendor relationships or tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but structures their outputs into operational workflows, cases, decisions and reports.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule outputs to structured cases
final_description: Review how SFTY links Travel Rule messaging, exception handling and audit evidence into one compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
